title: poa rajbhandarii
intro: Poa rajbhandarii, also known as the Himalayan blue grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The plant contains various bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, providing health benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved immune function, and protection against oxidative stress. In traditional medicine, Poa rajbhandarii is often prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and also used in the form of powder or extract, to leverage its medicinal properties.
